meaning: n.解剖者,解剖学家,解剖器
examples: This paper introduces SIMS applications in semiconductor discrete component dissector .
Image dissector shows that the corresponding density represents its expression intensity.
The image-dissector scanner is another heavily used and very successful low light level detector.
You can use electrocautery, a hook, a pair of scissors, a sharp-tip dissector, a blunt-tip dissector, a right-angle dissector, or a suction device.
